# Celestial Cartographers
## Scripture
Psalm 19:1-4 - "The heavens declare the glory of God; the skies proclaim the work of his hands. Day after day they pour forth speech; night after night they reveal knowledge. They have no speech, they use no words; no sound is heard from them. Yet their voice goes out into all the earth, their words to the ends of the world."

## Reflection
As we gaze up at the night sky, we are reminded of the grand tapestry of God's creation. The stars, planets, and galaxies are like intricate maps, guiding us toward the majesty of our Creator. Just as cartographers map the earth, God has etched His signature across the cosmos, revealing His glory and wisdom. The heavens declare His glory, pouring forth speech that echoes through eternity. As we navigate the journey of faith, we can trust in God's sovereignty, knowing that He has charted a course for our lives, leading us toward eternal purpose.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we marvel at the celestial wonders, we are reminded of Your infinite power and wisdom. Help us to navigate the journey of faith with confidence, trusting in Your sovereignty and guidance. May the heavens continue to declare Your glory, and may our lives reflect the beauty and wonder of Your creation. Shine Your light upon us, that we may be beacons of hope in a world in need of Your love and redemption.
